headline: GameStop Stock Jumps 9% on eBay Bid Report, Reigniting Meme Stock Frenzy
summary: GameStop stock surged 9% after a WSJ report on a potential eBay takeover bid, reigniting meme stock excitement on Reddit.

raw.headline: GameStop Stock Jumps 9% on eBay Bid Report, Reigniting Meme Stock Frenzy

headline: Why eBay (EBAY) Is Up 6.3% After Beating Q1 Targets and Boosting Guidance
summary: eBay recently reported past first-quarter 2026 results, with revenue rising to US$3.09 billion and net income reaching US$512 million, alongside new guidance for second-quarter revenues of about US$3.00 billion and diluted GAAP EPS from continuing operations of US$1.09–US$1.14. At the same time, eBay confirmed a US$0.31 per-share dividend and moved to oppose a shareholder proposal seeking easier access to special meetings, underscoring an emphasis on capital returns and board control over...
